summary.zh: 以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进
summary.en: Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning

description.zh: 中国象棋让游戏 AI 面对非对称兵种、炮、九宫、楚河汉界、长将长捉规则以及高度战术化的攻杀。issue 中要求的 AlphaCat 在这里作为 2000 年代象棋引擎浪潮的一部分呈现：极大极小搜索、位棋盘或紧凑棋盘编码、开局知识和调校评估函数，是通向强棋力的主要实践路线。
description.en: Chinese chess made game AI confront asymmetric pieces, cannons, palaces, rivers, repetition rules, and very tactical attacking play. The issue-requested AlphaCat entry is represented here as part of the broader 2000s xiangqi-engine wave, where minimax search, bitboards or compact board encodings, opening knowledge, and tuned evaluation functions became the practical path to strong play.

place.zh: 计算机奥林匹克中国象棋项目

role.zh: ICGA 中国象棋项目参赛程序背后的开发者
role.en: Programmers behind ICGA Chinese Chess entrants

role.zh: issue 指定的代表性系统
role.en: Representative system requested by the issue

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量迁移，展示层默认 preserve-legacy，需后续人工细化 claims 与来源绑定。
notes.en: Batch migrated from generated legacy milestone; presentation defaults to preserve-legacy, with claims and source bindings needing later review.
